steps.title: Identify what the blank must mean
steps.content: The passage defines "agglomeration economies" as benefits enjoyed by firms in the same industry that ______ in a region. The example clarifies: firms that locate near one another share information and spur innovation. So the blank must mean "gather or cluster together in a place."

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
Substitute each word into the blank and test it against "locate near one another":
  • "recur": recur means happen repeatedly over time — it says nothing about firms clustering in a location. ✗
  • "dissipate": dissipate means spread out or scatter — the opposite of clustering; firms that dissipate would lose the agglomeration benefits entirely. ✗
  • "concentrate": concentrate means gather in one place — exactly what firms do when they "locate near one another" to share information and gain economic benefits. ✓
  • "terminate": terminate means end or cease — firms that terminate cannot enjoy any economic benefits at all. ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
